title: Richie Rich Anklet — Pyrite & Black Obsidian Crystal Anklet
short_description: A sleek black-toned anklet pairing metallic Pyrite accents with glossy Black Obsidian beads — Studd Muffyn's Richie Rich blend of prosperity and protection, made for everyday styling.
body_html:
Step into every moment with quiet confidence. The Richie Rich Anklet keeps things minimal and meaningful — a fine black-toned chain carrying two metallic Pyrite accents and two glossy Black Obsidian centre beads, held together by a secure clasp.

Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, ambition and confidence, while Black Obsidian is linked with grounding and protection from draining energy. Together they form Studd Muffyn's signature Richie Rich combination — abundance that stays grounded.

Why you'll love it

  • Prosperity meets protection: Pyrite's wealth-inspired symbolism balanced with Black Obsidian's grounding, protective association.
  • Minimal crystal arrangement: two polished black beads framed by metallic Pyrite for a balanced, distinctive look.
  • Sleek black-toned chain: a fine chain that feels clean and contemporary, never heavy.
  • Secure clasp closure: keeps the anklet comfortably fastened and easy to wear.
  • Everyday styling: the neutral black-and-metallic palette pairs with casual, western and festive outfits.

Crafted with

  • Pyrite accents — metallic Pyrite beads frame the centre and add an earthy, premium finish.
  • Black Obsidian beads — two smooth, polished beads form the bold central highlight.
  • Black-toned chain — a fine metallic chain that complements the darker crystal arrangement.
  • Secure clasp — a dependable closure that makes the anklet easy to put on and take off.

The Richie Rich meaning

Pyrite is traditionally regarded as a symbol of abundance, financial growth and confidence — often worn as an intention crystal by people chasing new opportunities. Black Obsidian is traditionally worn as a symbolic shield against negativity and distraction. Together they represent moving towards prosperity while staying grounded and protected.

How to wear

  • Open the clasp gently and place the anklet around your ankle.
  • Fasten the clasp securely and adjust so the beads sit towards the front or outer side.
  • Set an intention connected with prosperity, confidence or protection.
  • Remove it gently after use and store it safely.

Pair it with cropped jeans, trousers, dresses, skirts or ankle-length ethnic wear to keep the crystal detailing visible — it works beautifully with black footwear and monochrome styling.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and should not be considered medical or financial guarantees.
seo_title: Richie Rich Anklet | Pyrite & Black Obsidian Anklet
seo_description: Sleek black-toned crystal anklet with metallic Pyrite & glossy Black Obsidian beads. Prosperity meets protection. Ships in 24 hrs · COD · Free shipping over ₹499.

metafields.highlights: Pyrite + Black Obsidian crystal combination · Two polished Black Obsidian centre beads · Metallic Pyrite accent beads · Sleek black-toned chain · Secure clasp fastening · Lightweight, minimal, everyday design · Prosperity- and protection-inspired symbolism · Great for gifting.
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Genuine Pyrite accent beads, polished Black Obsidian beads, fine black-toned metal chain, secure metal clasp.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, sweat, perfume, lotion and harsh chemicals. Remove before bathing, swimming, exercising or sleeping. Do not pull or twist the chain. Wipe with a soft, dry cloth after use and store separately in a pouch. To cleanse: wipe with a dry cloth, rest near selenite or under soft moonlight, and avoid soaking, salt or abrasive cleaners.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Is this an anklet or a bracelet?
faqs.a: It is designed as an anklet, but the fine chain and compact crystal arrangement mean it also styles beautifully as a minimal bracelet.
Yes. The design uses genuine metallic Pyrite accent beads and polished Black Obsidian beads set on a black-toned chain.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for men and women?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The neutral black-and-metallic palette and minimal design make it a unisex piece that suits everyone.

faqs.q: Can I wear it in water?
faqs.a: We recommend keeping it away from water, sweat and chemicals. Remove it before bathing, swimming or exercising to preserve the black finish and crystal shine.

faqs.q: What do Pyrite and Black Obsidian mean?
faqs.a: Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, ambition and confidence, and Black Obsidian with grounding and protection. Together they represent our Richie Rich idea of abundance that stays grounded. These are traditional beliefs, not guarantees.
It is a one-size design meant to sit neatly around the ankle. Style the beads towards the front or outer side for the best look.
